summary: Invoice email delivery was delayed and the team was not alerted automatically.

severity.rationale: Low impact incident or informational follow-up.

evidence.text: Invoice email delivery was delayed and the team was not alerted automatically.
Customers received invoice emails late, but invoice data remained available in the account dashboard.

contributing_factors.description: The delivery queue alert was missing for the invoice email worker.

evidence.text: The delivery queue alert was missing for the invoice email worker. The monitoring gap delayed detection until customer support escalated the issue.

action_items.description: Add an alert for invoice email queue age.

evidence.text: Add an alert for invoice email queue age.
Customers received invoice emails late, but invoice data remained available in the account dashboard.

action_items.description: Review monitoring coverage for customer notification workers.

evidence.text: Review monitoring coverage for customer notification workers.
Customers received invoice emails late, but invoice data remained available in the account dashboard.

supporting_evidence.text: Customers received invoice emails late, but invoice data remained available in the account dashboard.
The delivery queue alert was missing for the invoice email worker. The monitoring gap delayed detection until customer support escalated the issue.
The team restarted the email workers and confirmed the invoice delivery queue drained.

07:20 UTC - Customer support reported missing invoice emails. | 07:31 UTC - Engineers found a delivery queue backlog. | 07:42 UTC - Workers were restarted. | 08:05 UTC - Email delivery backlog cleared.
